title: adenandra uniflora
intro: Adenandra uniflora, also known as the single-flowered adenandra, is a flowering plant species in the family Rutaceae. This plant is believed to have various medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Adenandra uniflora are said to include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and easing digestive problems. In traditional medicine, Adenandra uniflora is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
